node.statement: End(B(H)_sa) with ||T||:=sup{||Ta||:||a||<=1} is a unital normed algebra. B(H)_sa is a normed space (order norm, GT-order-unit-norm). From the sup-definition: ||Id||=sup{||a||:||a||<=1}=1; ||(T+U)a||<=||Ta||+||Ua|| gives ||T+U||<=||T||+||U||; and ||TUa||<=||T|| ||Ua||<=||T|| ||U|| ||a|| gives submultiplicativity ||TU||<=||T|| ||U||. It is moreover a Banach algebra (B(H)_sa is a complete order-unit space, GT-order-unit-norm), so the function calculus GT-funcalc applies.
